summary: Frontend testing completed for 3 new conversion-focused landing page sections plus social proof and final CTA. All sections render correctly with proper content, styling, and mobile responsiveness. Login form submission bug persists from previous iteration.

ui_bugs.issue: KNOWN BUG from iteration_18: Form submission does not trigger the login API call. The API works correctly when called directly via curl, but the form's onSubmit handler doesn't execute the API request properly.

action_items: KNOWN BUG: Fix login form submission - the form's onSubmit handler is not triggering the API call (carried over from iteration_18)
critical_code_review_comments: All 3 new landing page sections implemented correctly with proper data-testid attributes
Missed vs Captured section has animated BTC candlestick chart with AlphaAI vs Your entry markers
Timing Gap section has proper Free vs Pro comparison with timeline visualization
Today's Signals section uses dynamic date and hardcoded signal data for preview
Social Proof section has 3 placeholder testimonials with proper styling
Final CTA section has proper gradient background and purple CTA button
All button links correctly configured: hero→/dashboard, close-gap→/pricing, signals-cta→/pricing, final-cta→/dashboard
Mobile responsiveness working correctly - sections stack vertically on small screens

success_rate.frontend: 95% (All new sections work, login form submission bug persists)
